REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOSITION TO THE DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER FOUNDATION

DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST, ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER AND ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER FOUNDATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM COMES WITHIN THE STATUTORY DEFINITION OF PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE AND IS GOVERNED BY A ONE-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF CANNOT AVOID THAT RESULT BY ELIMINATING WORDS FROM HIS COMPLAINT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189. (301)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-30-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, JOSE U TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER FOUNDATION DEFENDANT TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-27-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF JOSE HERNANDEZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
